title: aspalathus triflorus
intro: Aspalathus triflorus, also known as Rooibos, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, native to South Africa. It has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been attributed to its high content of aspalathin and other flavonoids. Rooibos tea has been consumed to promote digestive health, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve sleep quality, and has also been used topically to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Rooibos can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water, or as a supplement in capsule or powder form, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its health benefits.
